title: Cymbalariella hederacea
taxonomy: Cymbalariella hederacea is a species of lichenized fungus, belonging to the family Parmeliaceae. It is a type of foliose lichen, meaning it has a leaf-like growth habit. The classification of this species is as follows: kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, class Lecanoromycetes, order Lecanorales, family Parmeliaceae, genus Cymbalariella. Within the genus Cymbalariella, it is specifically classified as Cymbalariella hederacea. Further classification at the species level is based on its unique characteristics and morphology.
